text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Uuugh, this is the worst... How could I have made
this mistake?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: At the cafeteria... Manhattan Cafe sat next to me.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Which is fine in itself... but I drank her coffee by
mistake.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
The color and the smell, it was so evidently
coffee. How could I have made such a mistake?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Uuugh, my mouth still tastes bitter...
